creator: romain@blogreen.org
text:
Hi Tom!

The taglib-sharp website is back!  However, I saw that Paul Newman has
imported it in the bsd-sharp [1] source repository [2].

I therefore guess we can close this PR.

Thank's
Romain

References:
  1. http://code.google.com/p/bsd-sharp/
  2. http://code.google.com/p/bsd-sharp/source/browse/trunk/devel/taglib-sharp

-- 
Romain Tartière <romain@blogreen.org>        http://romain.blogreen.org/
